name: Dr. Kamran Malik
subject: Research Collaboration on Urdu LLMs
message: Assalam-o-Alaikum! Congratulations on forming UETronForge AI. Your paper on Roman Urdu localization is highly promising. I would love to discuss a potential joint research proposal for the HEC Pakistan Technology Development Fund (TDF) next month. Please let me know your availability for a meeting at the CS Department.

name: Sarmad Alvi
subject: Inquiry: CropShield Integration
message: Hello UETronForge team! We run an agri-tech consulting firm in Lahore and are highly interested in your CropShield Vision disease classifier. We would love to test your offline SDK or API with our network of 500+ wheat farmers. Do you have a licensing model or are you looking for beta-testing partners? Best regards, Sarmad.
